description_long: This is a single-story bungalow with a prominent red gable roof featuring solar panels along its length. The front facade has three large blue windows and a central entrance, flanked by a driveway with a carport on one side and a glass-enclosed sunroom on the other. The property is landscaped with symmetrical rows of stylized trees and a rectangular flower bed in front. The rear and side views reveal additional windows and a consistent arrangement of trees, emphasizing the bungalow's integration with its garden surroundings. The structure appears to be constructed primarily from concrete or brick, with glass for the windows and sunroom, and metal or tile for the roof. The overall design is modern with clean lines and a focus on energy efficiency.
description: A modern single-story bungalow with a red gable roof, solar panels, large blue windows, a glass sunroom, and landscaped gardens with stylized trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, three large blue windows, a carport, a glass sunroom, and a flower bed.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the red gable roof with solar panels and the glass sunroom at the end.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a row of windows, the full extent of the solar-paneled roof, and a line of trees along the property.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the driveway, flower bed, and the rear entrance with more trees lining the property.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with grouped side and rear windows
